title: Economy-batch, open-weight

reference_workload.blend_note: 3:1 input:output. The unit is USD per 1M OUTPUT-equivalent units; producing 1M output consumes 3M input.

reference_unit_note: Tokenizer-normalized: native per-token prices are divided by each model's chars_per_token so routes compare on delivered work, not token-count artifacts.

thresholds._note: v0 PLACEHOLDERS. Calibrate T_in/T_out from a first baseline run over known-good economy models. Not settlement-grade. Per-axis overrides go alongside 'default'.
